title: AST semantic indexer v0
description: Build .harness/bin/ast_index.py (stdlib-only): `build` walks workspace *.py files (skip reference repos and .harness/logs) using the ast module and emits .harness/index/symbols.json mapping symbol -> [{file, line, kind}] for functions/classes/methods; `query <symbol>` prints locations. This is ZCode parity item #3 so agents can navigate without reading whole files.
acceptance_criteria: build completes on this repo in under 30s
query finds a known symbol (e.g. cmd_claim) with correct file:line
